accountOptional: Learning works without one — an account only syncs your progress across devices.
clozeLabel: Type the missing word — any script, accents optional
deleteFailed: Deletion failed — try again in a moment.
erasedNotice: Your account and its data are gone. Local progress on this device is untouched.
exportFailed: Export failed — try again in a moment.
haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
noCourse: No course yet — the seed is on its way.
noDrafts: No drafts are waiting for review.
nothingDue: Nothing is due right now. Come back later.
progressFollows: Your progress now follows you across devices.
reviewUnavailable: The review queue is unavailable — are you signed in as an admin?
signInIssue: That did not work — check the details and try again.
signUpFailed: Could not create the account — the email may be taken, or the password is shorter than 8 characters.
statsNote: Everything aggregate, nothing personal — the project in public.
syncedDown: {count} reviews arrived from your other devices.
syncedReviews: {count} new reviews synced from this device.
typedLabel: Type it in Interslavic — any script, accents optional
unreachable: The server is unreachable — try again in a moment.
unreachableNow: The server is unreachable right now.
usersUnavailable: The user list is unavailable — are you signed in as an admin?
